title: xanthostemon aurantiacus
intro: Xanthostemon aurantiacus, also known as the Australian yellow-wood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Xanthostemon aurantiacus include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Xanthostemon aurantiacus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
